cookieConsent.title: We use cookies
cookieConsent.description: We use cookies to improve your experience on our site, analyze traffic, and personalize content. You can accept all cookies or manage your preferences.

s1.title: 1. General Information
s1.body: This Privacy Policy defines the principles of processing and protecting personal data provided by Users in connection with using the services offered by Power Automation.

s2.title: 2. Data Controller
s2.body: The data controller is Power Automation. Personal data is processed in accordance with applicable law, in particular the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

s3.title: 3. Data We Collect
s3.intro: We collect the following categories of data:
s3.item4: Technical data (IP address, cookies, browser data)

s4.title: 4. Purpose of Data Processing
s4.intro: Your personal data is processed for the following purposes:
s4.item3: Analysis and improvement of our services

s5.title: 5. Cookies
s5.body: Our site uses cookies to ensure proper functionality, analyze traffic, and personalize content. You can manage cookie settings through your browser settings or via our consent panel.

s6.title: 6. Data Sharing
s6.body: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties without your consent, except as required by law or necessary for service delivery (e.g., courier companies, payment operators).

s7.title: 7. Your Rights
s7.body: You have the right to access your data, rectify it, erase it, restrict processing, data portability, and object to processing. To exercise your rights, contact us at the email address provided on the contact page.

s8.title: 8. Contact
s8.body: If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy or the processing of your personal data, please contact us via the form on the Contact page.
